
```{r setup, results="hide"}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(cache = F, message = FALSE)
source("utils.R")
theme_set(theme_light())
```



```{r setup, results="hide"}
# ============================================================
# Setup
# ============================================================
knitr::opts_chunk$set(cache = FALSE, message = FALSE)

library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)

theme_set(theme_light())

# ============================================================
# Common settings
# ============================================================
folder_path <- "output1725/result_0122/result/10000/"
file_list <- list.files(folder_path, "\\.rds$", full.names = TRUE)

colors_model <- c(
  "Random Forest"   = "#009E73",
  "SVM"             = "#D55E00",
  "Neural Networks" = "#0072B2",
  "XGBoost"         = "#6A3D9A"
)

x_breaks <- seq(0, 0.6, 0.1)

# ============================================================
# Helper
# ============================================================
extract_metric <- function(metrics, name) {
  map_dbl(metrics, function(m) {
    i <- which(m$metric == name)
    if (length(i) == 0) NA_real_ else m$value[i[1]]
  })
}

# ============================================================
# Load data
# ============================================================
all_results <- map_dfr(file_list, function(file) {

  df <- readRDS(file)
  fname <- basename(file)

  tibble(
    heterogeneity_rate =
      str_extract(fname, "e[0-9.]+") |> str_remove("e") |> as.numeric(),
    model_type = str_extract(fname, "rf|svm|nn|xgb"),
    f1     = extract_metric(df$metrics, "f1"),
    auroc  = extract_metric(df$metrics, "auroc"),
    auprc  = extract_metric(df$metrics, "auprc"),
    review = extract_metric(df$metrics, "review_pct_99")
  )
}) |>
  mutate(
    model_type = recode(
      model_type,
      rf  = "Random Forest",
      svm = "SVM",
      nn  = "Neural Networks",
      xgb = "XGBoost"
    )
  )

# ============================================================
# A. AUPRC (0–100%)
# ============================================================
p_auprc <- ggplot(all_results,
                  aes(heterogeneity_rate, auprc, color = model_type)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors_model) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = x_breaks,
                     labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1),
    breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.1),
    labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "AUPRC", color = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

# ============================================================
# B. Manual Review (0–100%)
# ============================================================
p_review <- ggplot(all_results,
                   aes(heterogeneity_rate, review, color = model_type)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors_model) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = x_breaks,
                     labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1),
    breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.1),
    labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Manual review (%)", color = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

# ============================================================
# C. AUROC (50–100%)
# ============================================================
p_auroc <- ggplot(all_results,
                  aes(heterogeneity_rate, auroc, color = model_type)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors_model) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = x_breaks,
                     labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0.5, 1.0),
    breaks = seq(0.5, 1.0, 0.1),
    labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "AUROC", color = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

# ============================================================
# D. F1 (50–100%)
# ============================================================
p_f1 <- ggplot(all_results,
               aes(heterogeneity_rate, f1, color = model_type)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors_model) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = x_breaks,
                     labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0.5, 1.0),
    breaks = seq(0.5, 1.0, 0.1),
    labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "F1 score", color = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

# ============================================================
# Combine
# ============================================================
fig_err <-
  (p_auprc | p_review) /
  (p_auroc | p_f1) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") &
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    plot.tag = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold")
  )

fig_err <- fig_err & labs(x = "Heterogeneity rate")

print(fig_err)

# ============================================================
# Save
# ============================================================
ggsave(
  filename = paste0("figures1725/Figure_err_final_", format(Sys.Date(), "%m%d"), ".png"),
  plot = fig_err,
  width = 14,
  height = 10,
  dpi = 300
)
```




```{r}

# ============================================================
# Setup
# ============================================================
knitr::opts_chunk$set(cache = FALSE, message = FALSE)

library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)

theme_set(theme_light())

# ============================================================
# Common settings
# ============================================================
folder_path <- "output1725/result_0122/result/10000/"
file_list <- list.files(folder_path, "\\.rds$", full.names = TRUE)

colors_model <- c(
  "Random Forest"   = "#009E73",
  "SVM"             = "#D55E00",
  "Neural Networks" = "#0072B2",
  "XGBoost"         = "#6A3D9A"
)

x_breaks <- seq(0, 0.6, 0.1)

# ============================================================
# Helper: extract metric
# ============================================================
extract_metric <- function(metrics, name) {
  map_dbl(metrics, function(m) {
    i <- which(m$metric == name)
    if (length(i) == 0) NA_real_ else m$value[i[1]]
  })
}

# ============================================================
# Load all metrics ONCE
# ============================================================
all_results <- map_dfr(file_list, function(file) {

  df <- readRDS(file)
  fname <- basename(file)

  tibble(
    heterogeneity_rate =
      str_extract(fname, "e[0-9.]+") |> str_remove("e") |> as.numeric(),
    model_type = str_extract(fname, "rf|svm|nn|xgb"),
    f1     = extract_metric(df$metrics, "f1"),
    auroc  = extract_metric(df$metrics, "auroc"),
    auprc  = extract_metric(df$metrics, "auprc"),
    review = extract_metric(df$metrics, "review_pct_99")
  )
}) |>
  mutate(
    model_type = recode(
      model_type,
      rf  = "Random Forest",
      svm = "SVM",
      nn  = "Neural Networks",
      xgb = "XGBoost"
    )
  )

# ============================================================
# A. F1 score (50–100%)
# ============================================================
p_f1 <- ggplot(all_results,
               aes(heterogeneity_rate, f1, color = model_type)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors_model) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = x_breaks,
                     labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0.5, 1.0),
    breaks = seq(0.5, 1.0, 0.1),
    labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "F1 score", color = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

# ============================================================
# B. Manual Review % (unchanged)
# ============================================================
p_review <- ggplot(all_results,
                   aes(heterogeneity_rate, review, color = model_type)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors_model) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = x_breaks,
                     labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0.1, 0.5),
    breaks = seq(0.1, 0.5, 0.05),
    labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Manual review (%)", color = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

# ============================================================
# C. AUROC (50–100%)
# ============================================================
p_auroc <- ggplot(all_results,
                  aes(heterogeneity_rate, auroc, color = model_type)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors_model) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = x_breaks,
                     labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0.5, 1.0),
    breaks = seq(0.5, 1.0, 0.1),
    labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "AUROC", color = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

# ============================================================
# D. AUPRC (50–100%)
# ============================================================
p_auprc <- ggplot(all_results,
                  aes(heterogeneity_rate, auprc, color = model_type)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors_model) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = x_breaks,
                     labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0.5, 1.0),
    breaks = seq(0.5, 1.0, 0.1),
    labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "AUPRC", color = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

# ============================================================
# Combine (A | B) / (C | D)
# ============================================================
fig_err <-
  (p_f1 | p_review) /
  (p_auroc | p_auprc) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") &
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    plot.tag = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold")
  )

# shared x-axis label (patchwork-safe)
fig_err <- fig_err & labs(x = "Heterogeneity rate")

print(fig_err)

# ============================================================
# Save
# ============================================================
ggsave(
  filename = paste0("figures1725/Figure_err_ABCD_", format(Sys.Date(), "%m%d"), ".png"),
  plot = fig_err,
  width = 14,
  height = 10,
  dpi = 300
)

```
